headline: 3 Reasons TTWO Has Explosive Upside Potential
summary: Since December 2025, Take-Two has been in a holding pattern, posting a small loss of 4.7% while floating around $229.26. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 12.4% gain during that period.
